# Punto Reforma Costa Blanca

> Architecture and total renovations in Costa Blanca — for homes, apartments and commercial spaces. Custom carpentry, prime kitchens and bathrooms, project management and permits, from first idea to handover. One responsible contact throughout.

> Arquitectura de interiores y reformas integrales en Costa Blanca — para viviendas, pisos y locales comerciales. Carpintería a medida, cocinas y baños prime, coordinación de obra y gestión de permisos, desde la primera idea hasta la entrega. Un solo interlocutor responsable durante todo el proceso.

## Contact

- Website: https://costablanca.puntoreforma.es/
- Email: info@puntoreforma.es
- Phone: +34 662 411 064
- Location: Costa Blanca, Spain

## Services

- Reforma integral & gestión de obra — complete renovations for homes, apartments and commercial spaces, from first concept to handover
- Arquitectura & diseño — architecture, layout, material direction and design decisions for renovation projects
- Cocinas & baños prime — kitchens and bathrooms designed as central parts of the renovation
- Carpintería a medida & metal — bespoke wardrobes, storage, built-ins, furniture and custom metal constructions
- Comprobaciones técnicas & permisos — technical checks, permit coordination and procedures

## Pages

- [Home](https://costablanca.puntoreforma.es/): Services, process, gallery and contact form
- [Blog](https://costablanca.puntoreforma.es/blog/): Renovation guides and articles for Costa Blanca

## Blog Articles

- [Carpintería a medida en Costa Blanca](https://costablanca.puntoreforma.es/blog/carpinteria-a-medida-costa-blanca/): Custom carpentry prices and ideas for Costa Blanca: wardrobes, dressing rooms and practical storage for flats, villas and holiday homes by the sea.
- [Licencias de obra en Costa Blanca](https://costablanca.puntoreforma.es/blog/licencias-obra-costa-blanca/): What permit you need for renovation in Costa Blanca: minor works, major works and declaración responsable — which applies to your project.
- [Pintura y humedades en Costa Blanca](https://costablanca.puntoreforma.es/blog/pintura-humedades-costa-blanca/): What paint to use in Costa Blanca for interiors and facades, how to treat damp and mould in a Mediterranean coastal climate.
- [Reforma de baño en Costa Blanca](https://costablanca.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-bano-costa-blanca/): Real bathroom renovation prices in Costa Blanca: bath-to-shower conversion, waterproofing, sea-climate materials and realistic budget.
- [Reforma de cocina en Costa Blanca](https://costablanca.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-cocina-costa-blanca/): Kitchen renovation costs in Costa Blanca: prices, open-plan layouts, timelines and materials suited to the Mediterranean climate.
- [Reforma integral en Costa Blanca](https://costablanca.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-integral-costa-blanca/): Realistic guide to renovating a flat or villa in Costa Blanca: price per m², timelines, permits and full project management.
- [Reforma de piso en Costa Blanca](https://costablanca.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-piso-apartamento-costa-blanca/): Everything you need to renovate a flat or apartment in Costa Blanca: community rules, quotes, permits and budget planning.
- [Reforma de villa en Costa Blanca](https://costablanca.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-villa-costa-blanca/): Guide to renovating a villa in Costa Blanca: interior, terrace, pool, facade, materials and managing works from abroad.
- [Reformar para vender en Costa Blanca](https://costablanca.puntoreforma.es/blog/reformar-para-vender-costa-blanca/): Which renovations genuinely add value when selling in Costa Blanca and when it's worth investing before putting the property on the market.
